eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Klamath, OR; at 5:28 PM on JUL 18, 2026 Effective until 6:28 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Klamath County Sheriff: WILDFIRE Level 3 - GO NOW - Evacuate immediately from NORTH OF Loveless Rd, Ivory Pines Rd, NFD Road 4464 SOUTH OF NFD Road 4466, Cameron Dr EAST OF NFD Road 4464 WEST OF NFD Road 4466.
